reviews.review_description:
First of all, thank you to the developer who produced the uncommon 360 interactive film.
I didn't have the opportunity to watch the Wentworth drama, but I can fully understand the situation with the actors' lines and acting. During the course of the story, the items you can choose from come out, and the story changes as a result of the choices. Since it is not a long story, it is a structure in which the whole story is properly understood by changing the selection by followting the story multiple times.
I wish the story would extend a little more, but I was able to have fun with it.
Merci, Majerik!

reviews.review_title: INTENSE VR IMMERSION IN A TV SERIES!
reviews.review_description:
Wentworth VR delivers a powerful cinematic VR experience with strong immersion and storytelling. The 360° live-action format creates a real sense of presence, making you feel part of the story. A unique and engaging narrative VR experience.
NOTE FOR TV SERIES FANS: A new Wentworth spin-off series is in the works!
